race.comment: ZOUSTROLOGY (8) has been racing in stronger Maidens and made good improvement at Eagle Farm last time. Has an awkward barrier but will likely push forward, and the in-form Ben Thompson is a key jockey switch. Sets a decent standard. BEAR OIL (5) debuts and has won his last three trials. 2kg claiming apprentice Jett Newman sticks from the two most recent, and the blinkers are applied. Maps for a soft run and a bold effort is on the cards. VERONA GIRL (12) hasn't set the world on fire but resumes owning two Doomben trial wins. Delivered by 4L over 1000m in the latest and Cejay Graham sticks from those. Jumps from the inside barrier and has to be kept very safe. MAGIC INVADER (6) will find this easier than Eagle Farm and will be around the mark.
